PublicDescription: This event counts branches which are speculatively executed and mispredicted.
This event counts all speculatively executed branches.
Number of branch misprediction due to direction misprediction.
Number of branch misprediction due to direction misprediction for unconditional branches.
Number of branch misprediction due to direction misprediction for unconditional direct branches.
Number of resolved branch which made prediction by polymorphic indirect predictor.
Number of branch misprediction which made prediction by polymorphic indirect predictor.
This event counts the Indirect predictor entries flushed by region reclamation.
